postProcess.missingKey: Missing API key for post-processing. Configure it in settings.
postProcess.missingCustomPrompt: Custom instruction is empty. Fill it in the Post Process tab.

profile.label: Profile
profile.deleteConfirmDesc: This action cannot be undone. All data in this profile (notes, transcriptions, recordings) will be permanently deleted.

recording.transcribingDetail: Processing your audio with OpenAI Whisper...

history.emptySubtitle: Record your first audio to get started

transcriptionDetails.noAudio: No audio recording associated with this transcription.
transcriptionDetails.previewDisabled: Audio preview is disabled in settings.
transcriptionDetails.previewDisabledHelp: Audio preview disabled in audio settings.
transcriptionDetails.noAudioHelp: No audio saved for this transcription.
transcriptionDetails.emptyState: Select a transcription to see details

settings.footer: (c) 2026 - Automatic updates via GitHub, By Nolyo Claude

transcription.title: AI
transcription.subtitle: Transcription & smart notes
transcription.groqInfo: Ultra-fast Whisper hosted on Groq. Requires a Groq API key.
transcription.paidWarning: This service is pay-per-use. Use Local (Offline) mode for free and private transcription.
transcription.modelLargeV3Turbo: Large v3 Turbo (1.6 GB) - Best + Fast
transcription.modelLargeV3TurboQ5: Large v3 Turbo Q5 (547 MB) - Compact + Fast
transcription.keepModelInMemoryDesc: When disabled, the model is released after 2 min of inactivity to save RAM. Default: enabled on GPU, disabled on CPU.
transcription.translateModeDesc: Speak in French, write in English
transcription.translateOpenaiInfo: Uses OpenAI Whisper to translate to English
transcription.apiKeyHelp: Used by online transcription and AI assistant in notes. Not required if you only use local transcription.

audio.title: Audio
audio.subtitle: Recording and sounds configuration
audio.silenceThresholdHelp: Recordings below this threshold will be considered silence
audio.trimSilenceHelp: Removes leading and trailing silence before transcription

text.title: Text
text.subtitle: Formatting and auto-insertion
text.modeCursorDesc: Text is typed directly, without using the clipboard
text.modeClipboardDesc: Text is copied to clipboard then pasted (Ctrl+V)
text.modeNoneDesc: Text is only added to history

postProcess.title: Post Process
postProcess.subtitle: Reformat the transcription with AI (OpenAI or Groq)
postProcess.enableDesc: After each transcription, the text goes through AI using the selected mode.
postProcess.delayWarning: An AI call adds 1 to 3 seconds before the text is inserted.
postProcess.missingKey: Missing {{provider}} API key. Configure it in the AI tab before enabling this mode.
postProcess.customPromptPlaceholder: e.g.: Turn the dictation into a Jira note with 'Context', 'Work to do', 'Acceptance criteria' sections.
postProcess.customPromptRequired: Enter an instruction before using this mode.

auto.label: Auto (context detection)
auto.desc: Detects list, email, or free text and reformats automatically.

list.label: Bullet list
list.desc: Converts the dictated enumeration into a Markdown bullet list.

email.label: Email
email.desc: Restructures the dictation into an email (greeting, body, closing).

formal.label: Formal tone
formal.desc: Rewrites in a professional tone, without filler words.

casual.label: Casual tone
casual.desc: Rewrites in a fluid, natural tone without formality.

summary.label: Summary
summary.desc: Condenses the dictation into 2 to 3 essential sentences.

grammar.label: Grammar correction
grammar.desc: Corrects spelling and grammar without reformulating the content.

vocabulary.title: Vocabulary
vocabulary.subtitle: Custom snippets and words
vocabulary.snippetsDesc: Automatically replaces a dictated phrase with predefined text
vocabulary.dictionaryDesc: Words or phrases to favor during transcription
vocabulary.initialPromptDesc: Free text Whisper uses to set vocabulary and style. Show, don't tell: paste a code snippet, a sentence in the right tone, key words.
vocabulary.initialPromptPlaceholder: Stack: React, TypeScript, Tauri. Example: const user = await db.users.findMany({ where: { active: true } });

system.title: System
system.subtitle: Startup and file management
system.recordingsKeepHelp: Number of audio files to keep locally
system.themeDesc: Dark or light appearance of the interface

danger.title: Danger zone
danger.subtitle: Wipe all application data and start over from a clean install.
danger.dialogWarning: This permanently deletes all settings, profiles, transcriptions, recordings, notes, downloaded models and logs. The app will restart automatically.
danger.dialogConfirmInstruction: To confirm, type the phrase below exactly:

miniWindow.title: Mini window
miniWindow.subtitle: Audio visualizer and positioning
miniWindow.visualizerDesc: Pick how audio is rendered during recording. The waveform scrolls from right to left.
miniWindow.showTranscript: Show transcript preview in extended mode
miniWindow.showTranscriptDesc: When the mini window is tall enough, display a preview of the last transcribed text.
miniWindow.recenterDesc: Resets the mini window to its default size and places it above the taskbar.

shortcuts.title: Keyboard shortcuts
shortcuts.subtitle: Click a shortcut to modify it
shortcuts.pttDesc: Hold to record, release to transcribe
shortcuts.showWindowDesc: Opens and brings the main window to the foreground
shortcuts.postProcessToggleDesc: Only active while recording. Enables/disables AI post-processing.

hotkeyInput.listening: Press a key combination... (Escape to cancel)

updater.unavailableDesc: Not available in development or portable mode. Download manually from GitHub.
updater.upToDate: You're up to date! You're already using the latest version of Voice Tool.
updater.autoCheckDesc: The check runs 10 seconds after launch
updater.channelHelp: The stable channel receives tested versions. The beta channel gives access to new features earlier.
updater.secureUpdatesDesc: Cryptographically verified and downloaded from GitHub Releases via HTTPS.

apiConfig.title: API Key Configuration
apiConfig.description: Enter your API keys for transcription services. These keys are stored locally and securely.

folders.deleteConfirmDesc: Notes inside this folder will be moved to root.

editor.deleteConfirmDesc: This action is permanent. The note will be deleted from disk.

link.brokenTooltip: Note deleted — click to recreate it
link.brokenDialogDesc: The note "{{title}}" no longer exists. Create a new note with this title?

logs.emptySubtitle: Backend logs will appear here automatically

prompts.suffix: The text above is in Markdown format. Strictly preserve the Markdown structure of the original: headings (#, ##…), bullet lists (-, *), numbered lists (1.), bold (**), italic (*), links, tables, line breaks, and paragraphs. Return only the processed text in Markdown format, without explanation, without comment, and without a code block wrapping the response.
prompts.translate: You are a professional translator. If the text is in French, translate it to English. If the text is in English, translate it to French. Preserve the tone and style of the original text.
prompts.improveMail: You are a writing assistant. Improve this text for a professional email. Keep the same meaning and general tone, making the text clearer and more structured.
prompts.improveMessage: You are a writing assistant. Improve this text for an informal message (chat, SMS). Keep the same meaning while making the text more fluent and natural.
prompts.improveFormal: You are a writing assistant. Improve this text by adopting a formal and elevated tone, suitable for an official or administrative context. Keep the same meaning.
prompts.correct: You are a spelling and grammar proofreader. Correct all spelling, grammar, and punctuation errors in this text without changing the style or meaning.
prompts.summarize: You are an assistant. Summarize this text concisely while keeping the essential points and key information.
prompts.rephrase: You are a writing assistant. Rephrase this text differently while keeping exactly the same meaning. Use synonyms and a different sentence structure.

welcome.title: Welcome to Notes
welcome.intro: Select text to show the formatting menu. You can write in bold, italic, underline or strikethrough.
welcome.headingsDesc: Use the formatting menu to apply H1, H2, H3 headings to your paragraphs.
welcome.codeDesc: Type --- to insert a separator, or ``` for a code block.

errors.noSoundDesc: The audio level is too low to transcribe
errors.apiKeyNotConfigured: OpenAI API key not configured. Set it in settings.
errors.updaterUnavailable: Updates unavailable in development or portable mode

dashboard.emptyNotes: Select a note or create one from the sidebar
